reforms.description: The establishment of the Price Stabilizing Fund of the Fishing Industry aims to smooth out income fluctuations in the fishing sector by redistributing earnings based on price changes relative to a predetermined base price.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By stabilizing income in the fishing sector, the fund helps mitigate the economic impact of price volatility, supporting long-term sustainability and investment in the industry.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund has been established to manage price fluctuations in the fishing industry.
reforms.importance_rationale: The fund represents a significant policy tool for managing income stability in a key sector of the economy, with potential long-term benefits for the fishing industry.
reforms.source_quote: A relatively recent innovation adopting the latter approach is the establishment of the Price Stabilizing Fund of the Fishing Industry.
